data.content:
Here's the coverage summary for **ContosoUniversity**:

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Line coverage** | **42.5%** (20/47 lines) |
| **Branch coverage** | **43.7%** (7/16 branches) |
| **Method coverage** | 100% (4/4 methods hit) |
| **Full method coverage** | 25% (1/4 fully covered) |

### Per-method breakdown (`StudentService`):

| Method | Line Rate | Branch Rate |
|---|---|---|
| `Enroll` | 75% | 67% |
| `CalculateGpa` | **25%** | **20%** |
| `FindById` | 100% | 100% |
| `Search` | 50% | 50% |

**`CalculateGpa`** is the biggest gap — only 25% line coverage with most branches untested. `Search` and `Enroll` also have uncovered paths.
